creator: shun.fbsd.pr@dropcut.net
text:
Created attachment 156390
adding CPE information to Makefile

www/pivotx has had vulnerabilities with a CPE identifier assigned (e.g. CVE-2014-0342). This patch adds CPE information as suggested in the FreeBSD wiki[
0].

[0] https://wiki.freebsd.org/Ports/CPE
